papers.name: Paper 5 Investigation (Core)
papers.coverage_notes: Investigative and modelling tasks at Core tier.

assessment_objectives.name: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding
assessment_objectives.description: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of mathematical concepts and techniques.
classification_hints: Items asking for definitions, terminology, recall of formulae, basic calculations.

assessment_objectives.name: Apply knowledge and understanding in context
assessment_objectives.description: Apply mathematical knowledge and understanding to solve problems set in mathematical or real-life contexts.
classification_hints: Items requiring selection and application of techniques to novel or multi-step problems.

assessment_objectives.name: Investigate, model and solve problems
assessment_objectives.description: Investigate mathematical problems, develop and apply mathematical models, interpret and evaluate results.
classification_hints: Items requiring mathematical modelling, problem interpretation, multi-stage reasoning.

question_styles.name: Multiple choice
question_styles.description: Tests breadth of mathematical knowledge across the syllabus.

difficulty_ladder.description: Recall of facts, definitions or single-step application.

lesson_use.notes: Set supported=true only when a teacher/student/parent mode is declared and validated.

marking_guidance.command_words_ref: CAIE IGCSE Mathematics command words (calculate, show, solve, find, prove, etc.) are defined in Section 4 of the syllabus.
marking_guidance.notes: Tier-aware marking: Core tier caps at grade C; Extended tier allows A*-G. Calculator required for all papers.
